creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #1)
> I've tested USE_GCC=7 and will commit change that soon.

Thank you, Craig!

> Regarding obsolete gcc versions, Kyle Evans provide a great answer last time
> this came up:

Fair enough, though GCC 5.2 is reaaally rather old by now (even
within the GCC 5 series) so there may be problems we'll be running
into later on, even with USE_GCC=7.
